_doc: Account-size → {enabled strategies, contract size} plan for the live meta-strategy. Derived from real-account survival modeling (see SURVIVAL-MODE-SOLUTION.md). Query with: node account-plan.js <balance>. Plan = AGGRESSIVE (Drew-approved 2026-06-08): 0% ruin, ~35% worst drawdown, ~$4.36M median over 16mo in block-bootstrap. Manual reference — NOT wired into the orchestrator.

contractLadder._doc: Pick the highest tier whose minBalance <= current balance. Below the first tier, trade 1 MNQ. Mirrors the dashboard account-tracker ladder (no-trade-day/precompute-projection.py).

strategyPhaseIn._doc: A strategy is ENABLED when balance >= onBalance. The offBalance is the protective hysteresis level: if already enabled and balance falls below offBalance, DISABLE it. lstb is always on. level-fade is held out until $25k because it is the small-account death trap (2.2% ruin / 67% drawdown small; weakest PF; 'giveth then taketh away quick').

strategies.note: Always on. Only safe small-account vehicle (12-pt stop).
DEATH TRAP small. Hold until $25k. Disable first if bleeding.

expectations._doc: Block-bootstrap (clustering-aware), $1,500 start, 16 months. Survival first; these are not guarantees.
expectations.drawdownFloorNote: ~21% (lstb-only) to ~35% (aggressive). No sub-20% option exists with these strategies on this ladder.

alternatives.moderate: lt-3m/gex-flip on at $15k/$8k, level-fade $25k → ~$4.0M / 34% DD (dominated — same DD, less growth)
